Install · Mobile App

GET SLIMEWIRE

🐸 on your home screen 🧌

One tap puts the full SlimeWire terminal on your phone — live pairs, charts, one-tap trading and the autopilot. No app store. Free.

Open in Browser Instead →
Preparing your install…

🤖 Add to your phone

Tap Install App above.
Confirm Install in the popup your browser shows.
SlimeWire lands on your home screen — open it like any app.

🍎 Add to your iPhone

Tap the Share button ⎋ at the bottom of Safari.
Scroll down and tap Add to Home Screen ➕.
Tap Add — SlimeWire appears on your home screen.
Must be in Safari. If you opened this from another app, tap Open in Safari first (the compass icon), then follow the steps.

🌐 Open in your browser first

You're viewing this inside another app, so it can't install here. Open this page in Chrome or Safari and the install button works.

Tap the ⋯ / share menu in the top corner.
Choose Open in Chrome (Android) or Open in Safari (iPhone).
Then tap Install App on this page.

✅ You're all set

SlimeWire is already installed on this device. Open it from your home screen, or tap below.

⚡Live fresh pairsSeconds-old launches with SlimeShield safety reads built in.
📈One-tap tradingBuy and sell from your phone — managed wallets, real charts.
🤖AutopilotSet it and let the engine hunt setups while you sleep.
🔔Push alertsGet pinged on your TP wins and shield calls — even when closed.
SlimeWire · powered by Ogres 🧌
Prefer Telegram? @SlimeWireBot · Web: slimewire.org
